outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Day 76: Ship seized near UAE; Hezbollah drone wounds 3 at Rosh Hanikra; Lebanon-Israel talks open in DC
outlets.summary: CNN focuses on the maritime crisis (vessel seized near Fujairah heading to Iranian waters), Hezbollah ceasefire violations (fiber-optic drone, 3 wounded), and Washington talks on Lebanon. Framing: chaos undermining ceasefire prospects before May 17 expiry.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Israel and Lebanon meet in DC again for peace talks, even as attacks continue
outlets.summary: NPR covers the contradiction of peace talks opening in Washington while Hezbollah strikes Rosh Hanikra and Israel bombs a car in Sidon. Lebanon negotiators demand ceasefire, Israeli team presses on Hezbollah disarmament. Ceasefire expires May 17.

outlets.name: The Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth, Caine encounter intense bipartisan frustration with Iran war on Capitol Hill
outlets.summary: WaPo reports bipartisan anger at Hegseth and JCS Chair Caine over lack of clear endgame for the Iran war and the $29B cost to taxpayers.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump and Xi agree: Hormuz must remain open; ship seized near UAE as Tehran tests resolve
outlets.summary: Fox News leads with the Trump-Xi joint agreement on Hormuz as a diplomatic win for Trump, while also covering the vessel seizure as evidence Iran is testing resolve. Framing: Trump is making progress but Iran continues to provoke.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: LIVE UPDATES: Trump Declares Iran 'Under Control' As He Vows To 'Finish The Job'
outlets.summary: Daily Wire coverage emphasizes Trump's confidence that Iran is 'under control,' his vow to 'finish the job,' and ongoing protests inside Iran demanding an end to Supreme Leader rule.

outlets.name: Newsmax
outlets.headline: 3 GOP Senators Support Dems in Failed Iran War Powers Vote
outlets.summary: Newsmax reports the 50-49 war powers vote with Murkowski, Collins, and Paul breaking ranks. Frames outcome as a Republican victory despite record defection.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran War Day 76: Vance says progress made in talks; Israel pounds Lebanon ahead of Washington talks
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera focuses on Israeli strikes in Lebanon continuing even during peace talks, the Rosh Hanikra drone attack, and Araghchi denouncing expansionism and warmongering. Coverage emphasizes civilian suffering and the ceasefire violation.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: US Efforts to End Iran War Stumble as Ship Seized Near UAE
outlets.summary: Bloomberg leads with the Fujairah ship seizure as a sign that Iran is not ready to end hostilities, even as Trump meets Xi in Beijing. Also covers oil prices pulling back  on diplomacy optimism from the Trump-Xi summit joint statement.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Trump-Xi summit: China's help in Iran may require US concessions
outlets.summary: International analysis: Beijing, as Iran's largest oil buyer (80%+ of Iranian crude exports), holds significant leverage. Analysts warn China will demand Taiwan and trade concessions in exchange for Iran pressure.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Hezbollah drone wounds 3 at Rosh Hanikra; Lebanon-Israel DC talks open; IDF strikes Sidon car
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers the Rosh Hanikra fiber-optic drone attack (3 wounded, no sirens), Israeli air strikes in Sidon, and the opening of Round 3 peace talks in Washington. Also covers IDF evacuation orders for 6 south Lebanon villages and the Netanyahu-UAE controversy.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF weighs return to Gaza fighting pending Iran ceasefire; UAE worked with Mossad during Iran war
outlets.summary: JPost reports IDF discussing potential Gaza reentry once Iran situation stabilizes. Reveals UAE intelligence cooperation with Mossad throughout the Iran war.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Netanyahu Secretly Visited UAE, Met President During Iran War, PM's Office Says
outlets.summary: Haaretz liveblog confirms Netanyahu UAE visit while also tracking Hezbollah explosive drone attacks against northern Israel. Notes Iran's parliament threatening 90% uranium enrichment.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Araghchi: US-Israel pursuing expansionism and warmongering; instability a lose-lose for aggressors
outlets.summary: Press TV leads with Araghchi condemning US-Israel expansionism and warning the UAE against collusion with Israel. Iran frames the Beijing summit as irrelevant while rejecting what it calls US demands for surrender.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Tehran rejects US terms as hardliners push escalation; BRICS meeting unlikely to produce joint statement
outlets.summary: Iran International reports hardliners inside Tehran are pushing back against any compromise with the US, even as Araghchi attends BRICS. India's difficulty forging consensus noted given UAE-Iran tensions in the bloc.
